csv_upload.details: Multi/single church CSV upload with hash dedup

progressive_matching.details: 7 passes (0,3,6,12,35,60 days + text), min score 10 for text pass

duplicate_filter.details: 40-day window, same amount + first 80 chars of bank_desc

custom_patterns.details: Church-specific keyword pairs, +3 score in text pass, CRUD UI on reconciliation.php

document_check.details: 13-point audit checklist, sortable table, localStorage filters

transaction_search.details: Server-side search with OTS→Bank reverse lookup

session_management.details: 20-min Revizor session, AJAX keepalive, popup login with polling
